name: Layered Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the tomatoes and their liquid with the onion and garlic in a blender or food processor. Pour into a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Add the red pepper, salt, and tomato paste. Heat to a boil, then simmer for 5 to 10 minutes.
3. Place 3 tortillas in the bottom of the Crock Pot.
4. Layer with 1/3 ground beef, 1/3 tomato sauce, and 1/3 cheddar cheese.
5. Repeat layers two more times.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours.
